why.title: Why Choose Us?
why.subtitle: Everything you need to grow as a beauty professional in Alicante

flexible.title: Flexible Schedule
flexible.desc: Work whenever you want. Available 7 days a week, morning and evening, with no long-term commitments.

premium.title: Premium Equipment
premium.desc: Everything you need to work at the highest level: chairs, tools and consumables of the finest quality.

location.title: Prime Location
location.desc: In the heart of Alicante, Avenida Denia 5. Easy access, ample parking and high foot traffic.

network.title: Professional Network
network.desc: Share space with other industry experts, create synergies and expand your professional network.

costs.title: No Fixed Costs
costs.desc: No leases or long contracts. Pay only for what you use and run your business with total freedom.

lounge.title: Exclusive Waiting Area
lounge.desc: Your clients deserve the best. An elegant waiting area that reflects the quality of your work.
